scan-all-mailboxes.prompt: Scan all enabled Gmail mailboxes for new emails. Run from Q:/src/personal_projects/gmail-manager/: python -m src --scan-all. After the scan completes, you MUST use the fixed template at Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/templates/emailer-scan.html. Read the template file, then replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} values with actual data. Do NOT redesign the layout, change colors, rearrange sections, or generate HTML from scratch. Replace {{VO_SUBTITLE}} with: Agent: Emailer | Job: scan-all-mailboxes | Start: <ISO timestamp when job started> | Complete: <ISO timestamp when report is generated>. Replace {{MAILBOX_CARDS}} with one card block per mailbox containing: mailbox name, email address, message counts by category (auto-delete, review, keep, rollup), and actions executed. Save the report to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/emailer/scan-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html (using local time, zero-padded) and also as scan-latest.html in the same directory. Open the report in Edge after saving.
scan-all-mailboxes.description: Scans all Gmail mailboxes, classifies emails, generates daily digest
